---
title: "Syllabus Mapping"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
draft: true
---

This page will let you find resources tailored to your learning pathway, allowing you to navigate by country, exam board, course, and topic.


```{r}
#| results: asis
library(jsonlite)

nav <- read.csv("finalised_csv_content_management_final.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
nav_clean <- nav[!is.na(nav$Starmast.Link) &
nav$Starmast.Link != "" &
nav$Starmast.Link != "no",
c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5)]
names(nav_clean) <- c("country", "board", "course", "unit", "link")

get_title_from_qmd <- function(path) {
  if (is.na(path) || path == "") return(NA_character_)
  # remove leading ./ if present
  file_path <- sub("^\\./", "", path)
  if (!file.exists(file_path)) return(NA_character_)
  lines <- readLines(file_path, warn = FALSE)
  # expect YAML front matter starting with ---
  if (length(lines) < 3 || !grepl("^---\\s*$", lines[1])) return(NA_character_)
  end_yaml <- which(grepl("^---\\s*$", lines[-1]))[1] + 1
  yaml_text <- paste(lines[2:(end_yaml - 1)], collapse = "\n")
  y <- yaml::yaml.load(yaml_text)
  if (!is.null(y$title)) as.character(y$title) else NA_character_
}

unique_links <- unique(nav_clean$link)
title_lookup <- setNames(
  vapply(unique_links, get_title_from_qmd, character(1)),
  unique_links
)

nav_clean$title <- title_lookup[nav_clean$link]

countries <- sort(unique(nav$Country))
countries <- countries[!is.na(countries) & countries != ""]
countries_json <- toJSON(countries, auto_unbox = TRUE)

boards <- sort(unique(nav$Exam.board))
boards <- boards[!is.na(boards) & boards != ""]
boards_json <- toJSON(boards, auto_unbox = TRUE)

nav_json <- toJSON(nav_clean, dataframe = "rows", auto_unbox = TRUE)

cat('
<h2>Pick your country</h2>
<div id="country-container" class="country-grid"></div>

<h2 id="board-title" style="display:none; margin-top:2rem;">Pick your exam board</h2>
<div id="board-container" class="country-grid"></div>

<h2 id="course-title" style="display:none; margin-top:2rem;">Pick your course</h2>
<div id="course-container" class="country-grid"></div>

<h2 id="unit-title" style="display:none; margin-top:2rem;">Pick your topic</h2>
<div id="unit-container" class="country-grid"></div>

<h2 id="guide-title" style="display:none; margin-top:2rem;">Relevant STARMAST guides</h2>
<div id="guide-container" class="country-grid"></div>

<script>
const countries = ', countries_json, ';
const navData   = ', nav_json, ';

const container       = document.getElementById("country-container");
const boardTitle      = document.getElementById("board-title");
const boardContainer  = document.getElementById("board-container");
const courseTitle     = document.getElementById("course-title");
const courseContainer = document.getElementById("course-container");
const unitTitle       = document.getElementById("unit-title");
const unitContainer   = document.getElementById("unit-container");
const guideTitle      = document.getElementById("guide-title");
const guideContainer  = document.getElementById("guide-container");

let selectedCountry = null;
let selectedBoard   = null;
let selectedCourse  = null;
let selectedUnit    = null;

// COUNTRY SELECTION BOXES
countries.forEach(country => {
  const box = document.createElement("div");
  box.className = "country-box";
  box.textContent = country;

  box.onclick = () => {
    selectedCountry = country;
    selectedBoard = null;
    selectedCourse = null;
    selectedUnit   = null;

    container.querySelectorAll(".country-box").forEach(b =>
      b.classList.remove("selected")
    );
    box.classList.add("selected");

    boardContainer.innerHTML = "";
    courseContainer.innerHTML = "";
    unitContainer.innerHTML = "";
    guideContainer.innerHTML = "";
    courseTitle.style.display = "none";
    unitTitle.style.display = "none";
    guideTitle.style.display = "none";

    updateBoards();
  };

  container.appendChild(box);
});

// EXAM BOARD SELECTION BOXES
function updateBoards() {
  boardContainer.innerHTML = "";

  if (!selectedCountry) {
    boardTitle.style.display = "none";
    return;
  }

  boardTitle.style.display = "block";

  const boardsForCountry = Array.from(new Set(
    navData
      .filter(row => row.country === selectedCountry)
      .map(row => row.board)
  )).sort();

  boardsForCountry.forEach(board => {
    const box = document.createElement("div");
    box.className = "board-box";
    box.textContent = board;

    box.onclick = () => {
      selectedBoard = board;
      selectedCourse = null;
      selectedUnit   = null;

      boardContainer.querySelectorAll(".board-box").forEach(b =>
        b.classList.remove("selected")
      );
      box.classList.add("selected");

      courseContainer.innerHTML = "";
      unitContainer.innerHTML = "";
      guideContainer.innerHTML = "";
      unitTitle.style.display = "none";
      guideTitle.style.display = "none";

      updateCourses();
    };

    boardContainer.appendChild(box);
  });
}

// COURSE SELECTION BOXES
function updateCourses() {
  if (!selectedCountry || !selectedBoard) {
    courseTitle.style.display = "none";
    return;
  }

  courseTitle.style.display = "block";
  courseContainer.innerHTML = "";

  const coursesForSelection = Array.from(new Set(
    navData
      .filter(row =>
        row.country === selectedCountry &&
        row.board === selectedBoard
      )
      .map(row => row.course)
  )).sort();

  coursesForSelection.forEach(course => {
    const box = document.createElement("div");
    box.className = "course-box";
    box.textContent = course;

    box.onclick = () => {
      selectedCourse = course;
      selectedUnit   = null;

      courseContainer.querySelectorAll(".course-box").forEach(b =>
        b.classList.remove("selected")
      );
      box.classList.add("selected");

      unitContainer.innerHTML = "";
      guideContainer.innerHTML = "";
      guideTitle.style.display = "none";

      updateUnits();
    };

    courseContainer.appendChild(box);
  });
}

// UNIT (TOPIC) SELECTION BOXES
function updateUnits() {
  if (!selectedCountry || !selectedBoard || !selectedCourse) {
    unitTitle.style.display = "none";
    return;
  }

  unitTitle.style.display = "block";
  unitContainer.innerHTML = "";

  const unitsForSelection = Array.from(new Set(
    navData
      .filter(row =>
        row.country === selectedCountry &&
        row.board === selectedBoard &&
        row.course === selectedCourse
      )
      .map(row => row.unit)
  )).sort();

  unitsForSelection.forEach(unit => {
    const box = document.createElement("div");
    box.className = "unit-box";
    box.textContent = unit;

    box.onclick = () => {
      selectedUnit = unit;

      unitContainer.querySelectorAll(".unit-box").forEach(b =>
        b.classList.remove("selected")
      );
      box.classList.add("selected");

      updateGuides();
    };

    unitContainer.appendChild(box);
  });
}


// GUIDE LISTING SELECTION
function updateGuides() {
  guideContainer.innerHTML = "";

  if (!selectedUnit) {
    guideTitle.style.display = "none";
    return;
  }

  guideTitle.style.display = "block";

  const guidesForSelection = navData.filter(row =>
    row.country === selectedCountry &&
    row.board === selectedBoard &&
    row.course === selectedCourse &&
    row.unit === selectedUnit
  );

  guidesForSelection.forEach(guide => {
    const card = document.createElement("a");
    card.className = "guide-card";

    // Convert ./studyguides/file.qmd → /studyguides/file.html
    let href = guide.link || "";

    if (href.startsWith("./")) {
      href = href.substring(2);
    }

    if (href.endsWith(".qmd")) {
      href = href.slice(0, -4) + ".html";
    }

    if (!href.startsWith("/")) {
      href = "/" + href;
    }

    card.href = href;
    card.target = "_self";

    card.textContent = guide.title || guide.unit;

    guideContainer.appendChild(card);
  });
}

</script>

<style>
.country-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.country-box,
.board-box,
.course-box,
.unit-box,
.guide-card {
  padding: 16px;
  border: 2px solid #ccc;
  border-radius: 12px;
  text-align: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 600;
  transition: 0.2s;
  background-color: #f8f8f8;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: black;
}

.country-box:hover,
.board-box:hover,
.course-box:hover,
.unit-box:hover,
.guide-card:hover {
  border-color: #000;
  background-color: #eee;
}

.country-box.selected {
  border-color: #2563eb;
  background-color: #dbeafe;
}

.board-box.selected {
  border-color: #16a34a;
  background-color: #dcfce7;
}

.course-box.selected {
  border-color: #2563eb;
  background-color: #dbeafe;
}

.unit-box.selected {
  border-color: #16a34a;
  background-color: #dcfce7;
}
</style>
')

```
